119-s-177.title: Protect Funding for Women's Health Care Act

119-s-2801.title: Canterbury Shaker Village National Heritage Area Study Authorization Act

latest_action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources.

119-s-4041.title: Cooperative Watershed Management Program Reauthorization Act of 2026
119-s-4041.passage_nuance_reason: 此為既有計畫之再授權法案，屬例行性立法，且小組委員會已迅速舉行聽證，略顯進展；但僅有1位民主黨共同提案人、缺乏兩黨支持，整體調整幅度有限。

budget.notes: 本法案為重新授權性質，內文僅修訂定義與條文結構，未提供具體金額；可能於後續條款或須參照 16 U.S.C. 1015f 原授權金額。

latest_action.text: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources Subcommittee on Water and Power. Hearings held.

119-hr-7978.title: Cooperative Watershed Management Program Reauthorization Act of 2026
119-hr-7978.passage_nuance_reason: 僅有1位民主黨共同提案人且無兩黨支持，剛進委員會尚無行動；雖屬再授權類法案略具通過慣性，但整體動能薄弱，略低於基準。

budget.notes: 此為 Cooperative Watershed Management Program 的重新授權法案，提供的內文段落僅涉及定義修訂與條款重編，未出現具體授權或撥款金額。

latest_action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.

119-hr-3419.title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the telehealth network and telehealth resource centers grant programs.
119-hr-3419.passage_nuance_reason: 此為再授權類法案，委員會以48-0全票無異議通過並已列入聯合日曆，兩黨支持明確，通過機率顯著高於基準。

budget.notes: 此為授權再授權法案，將遠距醫療網絡與資源中心補助計畫展延至 FY2030，內文與摘要均未揭露具體授權金額。
